title: QUIC RFC 9000 ECN-CE Immediate ACK Scheduling Work Item
summary: Add direct requirement-home proof and focused trace links for immediate ACK scheduling when a processed packet is marked ECN Congestion Experienced.
planned_changes:
- Add positive, negative, and edge requirement-home tests for `REQ-QUIC-RFC9000-S13P2P1-0014`.
- Link the RFC 9000 Section 13.2.1 CE immediate-ACK requirement to a focused architecture, work-item, and verification artifact set while preserving the broad RFC9000-0001 trace.
- Preserve focused verification evidence under `artifacts/verification/20260425-rfc9000-ce-immediate-ack/`.
verification_plan: Run the focused RFC 9000 CE immediate-ACK requirement-home tests and the existing ACK_ECN cross-reference test, render/check the touched SpecTrace artifacts, verify reciprocal trace links for the focused artifact set, run `git diff --check`, and preserve evidence under `artifacts/verification/20260425-rfc9000-ce-immediate-ack/`.
out_of_scope: Receiver-side IP-header ECN parsing or socket configuration.
Endpoint ECN enablement and packet marking policy.
Congestion-control response to validated CE feedback.
Public API exposure for ECN behavior.
completion_notes: Completed as a direct requirement-home proof over existing ACK-generation state; no production behavior changed.
